context_history.content: I want to learn about: html. DO NOT greet me. Immediately start lesson Step 1 by explaining the core concept on the whiteboard.
HTML, or HyperText Markup Language, is the standard language used to create the structure of web pages. It acts as the skeleton of a website, defining where headings, paragraphs, and images appear.

visual_content.detail: HTML Code, Web Browser, Visual Website, "The browser reads HTML code and renders it as a structured website."
